About Us

A Construction Company Built on Trust

Averill Construction is a dynamic construction company serving clients across Harare and Zimbabwe. Founded in 2021, we deliver innovative, efficient, and cost-effective solutions for residential, commercial, and industrial projects — blending modern techniques with time-tested practices.

We manage every project from concept to completion, maintaining rigorous standards of quality, safety, and professionalism. Our approach: understand the client deeply, plan meticulously, build with skill, and deliver beyond expectation.

Integrity
Honesty and fairness in every dealing
Innovation
Embracing new technologies & methods
Quality
International workmanship standards
Safety
Secure environment for all on site
Teamwork
Collaboration with clients & communities
Sustainability
Building with respect for the future
What We Do

End-to-End Construction Solutions

From structural design through to interior finishing, we manage every aspect of your build.

01
Structural Design & Civil Works
Planning, structural calculations, and civil engineering at every scale.
02
Commercial Construction
Offices, retail spaces, warehouses, and commercial complexes.
03
Residential Builds
Modern homes, townhouses, and apartments built for comfort and durability.
04
Renovations
Upgrading and restoring existing structures to meet new needs.
05
Project Management
End-to-end supervision: timely delivery, cost control, quality assurance.
06
Electrical Works
Installation and maintenance of efficient electrical systems.
07
Roofing & Waterproofing
Durable roofing and water-resistant treatments to protect your investment.
08
Carpentry & Fittings
Custom woodwork, fittings, and cabinetry blending beauty with function.
09
Concrete Works
Slabs, driveways, columns, and foundations built to specification.
10
General Construction & Maintenance
All-round construction services and ongoing maintenance to keep structures in top condition, long after project completion.
